body:
## Summary
End-to-end integration test covering the complete user journey — REST endpoints + game state machine in one test suite.

## Test coverage (20 cases)

| Journey | Tests | What it catches |
|---|---|---|
| Register/Login | 6 | Duplicate username/email, wrong password, auth guard |
| User profile | 3 | Profile fetch, stats, unauthenticated rejection |
| Leaderboard + achievements + matches | 4 | Empty/404 handling |
| **Full PvE game** | 1 | Multi-round with skills+shuffle+play → WIN/LOSE → Match archive |
| Boundary conditions | 4 | Rapid inputs, empty confirm, missing room, duplicate room |
| Health checks | 2 | `/` and `/api` |

## How to run
```bash
docker compose up -d mongo
node --import tsx --test tests/integration/userJourney.test.ts
```

## Dependencies added
- `supertest` — HTTP assertions
title: test: add user journey integration test (20 cases)
